title: Right panel provider contract and registry
goal: Add a narrow provider registry for module-owned right drawer panels.
requirements: Create RightPanelDescriptor with source_code, object_type, object_id, mode, title, htmx_url, target, swap, drawer_size and context_hint.
Create RightPanelProvider protocol with can_open() and build_panel().
Validate source_code, object_type and mode as non-empty stable strings.
Reject duplicate providers unless replace=True is explicitly passed.
Unknown provider or unsupported mode must fail closed.
Do not import workorders or waiting_list in apps.core.
acceptance: Provider registration and duplicate protection are unit-tested.
Descriptor serialization is deterministic and contains no HTML body.
Unknown provider/mode returns a safe validation error.
apps.core remains independent of domain modules.
